notes: Input issues. Movementkeys WASD is mapped to ZAQD for some reason. Can use arrowkeys but grenade (F), reload (R), special ability (SHIFT) is hard to reach then. Some (very infrequent) graphical glitches/artifacts. Other than that its playable.
title: Bunch of Heroes

notes: Game runs perfect for me now. There were several games where could not move right or up. I didn't do anything to resolve this. It fixed itself. Several hours of survival play and the game plays normally
title: Bunch of Heroes

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
